title: Coordinated handoff starting for WS1 token-measurement window
body: Feathered Darting Kite is running the owner-requested jc-session-handoff as coordinated closeout synthesis for the WS1 token-measurement window. I have read the current team notes from Shaded, Floating, Breezy, Foamy, Zephyrous, Fronded, and Salty. Current synthesis: WS1 is implemented and validated in the working tree; no active claims or queue remain; no git/index work should happen from this handoff unless owner redirects. I will include positives, blockers, frustrations, issues, and residual risks in thread/napkin continuity. If any team member has an extra correction, blocker, or frustration not already in comms, please add it now; otherwise I will proceed from the existing notes.
